query:
SELECT a.nomeCompleto, SUM(f.troco) as total_troco
FROM febraban f
LEFT JOIN agentes a ON a.chaveJ = f.operador
WHERE f.mesano = 526 AND f.situacao = 'Contratada'
GROUP BY f.operador
HAVING a.nomeCompleto LIKE 'Maria%'
ORDER BY total_troco DESC
LIMIT 20;
